Editable source of the SECOND comprehensive test puzzle.
Made in f-puzzles, converted to SudokuPad via the marktekfan penpa-import tool
(https://marktekfan.github.io/sudokupad-penpa-import/).

Unlike test-puzzle.sudokumaker.json (puzzle 1, which is all-cosmetic), this one uses
NATIVE f-puzzles constraints — Kropki dots, an Arrow, an X-diagonal (sudokuX), cages —
plus extra cosmetics. Native constraints can render through different DOM paths than the
cosmetic look-alikes, so this puzzle widens our coverage.

── Play (SudokuPad — what the userscript runs on) ──
https://sudokupad.app/3x3zm2co6o

── Edit (f-puzzles, self-contained ?load= link) ──
Open this to edit, then re-export / re-convert. It does NOT depend on f-puzzles storing
the short id — the whole puzzle is in the URL (LZString-compressed f-puzzles JSON; the
same bytes SudokuPad stores after its "fpuz" prefix). THIS is the durable editable backup.

https://f-puzzles.com/?

── f-puzzles server short-link (also opens editable; depends on f-puzzles keeping the id) ──
https://f-puzzles.com/?id=28mrvd59
